li.xpath: /Defs/GameConditionDef[defName="INCExtremeColdSnap" or defName="INCExtremeHeatWave" or defName="INCToxicRain" or defName="INCCorseFog" or defName="INCCrimsonRain" or defName="ToxicRain" or defName="ExtremeColdSnap" or defName="ExtremeHeatWave"]
